references/eClassifiers/ProcessVariable/.title: ProcessVariable
references/eClassifiers/ProcessVariable/.content: * A process-level variable declared in the processVariables section. Process variables hold state that is visible to all activities within the same process instance. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/Container/refere.title: start
references/eClassifiers/Container/refere.content: Type Node Multiplicity 0..1 * A synthetic node populated from startName, startType, startX, startY

references/eClassifiers/Group/references.title: width
references/eClassifiers/Group/references.content: Type EInt Multiplicity 0..1 * Width of the expanded group frame on the design canvas.

references/eClassifiers/TypedElement/ref.title: type
references/eClassifiers/TypedElement/ref.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 * Fully-qualified Java class name of the activity implementation, e.g. “com.tibco.pe.core.WriteToLogActivity”.

references/eClassifiers/NamedElement/ref.title: description
references/eClassifiers/NamedElement/ref.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 * Optional human-readable description of this element.

references/eClassifiers/Activity/referen.title: inputBindings
references/eClassifiers/Activity/referen.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 * XSL input bindings for this activity, stored as raw XML text.

references/eClassifiers/ProcessDefinitio.title: endType
references/eClassifiers/ProcessDefinitio.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 * Canonical type of the end element (optional).

references/eClassifiers/Folder/reference.title: resourceType
references/eClassifiers/Folder/reference.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 * Loaded from .folder file repository/folder resourceType attribute

references/eClassifiers/Label/references.title: fade
references/eClassifiers/Label/references.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 * Opacity / fade value.

references/eClassifiers/Group/references.title: collapsedWidth
references/eClassifiers/Group/references.content: Type EInt Multiplicity 0..1 * Width of the group icon when collapsed.

index.html.title: BW 5.x Model
index.html.content: Xcore model for BW 5.x concepts. Transition Node source outgoingTransitions target incomingTransitions ProcessDefinition TypedNode Label labels ProcessVariable processVariables Starter starter Container transitions NamedElement TypedElement Activity activities Group groups Folder Call Project Resource resources parent CallTarget incomingCalls target Caller caller outgoingCalls start end BW5

references/eClassifiers/TypedNode/refere.title: resourceType
references/eClassifiers/TypedNode/refere.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 * Palette / resource-type identifier used by the BW Designer, e.g. “ae.activities.log”.

references/eClassifiers/Container/refere.title: end
references/eClassifiers/Container/refere.content: Type Node Multiplicity 0..1 * A synthetic node populated from endName, endType, endX, endY

references/eClassifiers/Label/references.title: type
references/eClassifiers/Label/references.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 * Label shape type.

references/eClassifiers/ProcessDefinitio.title: startType
references/eClassifiers/ProcessDefinitio.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 * Canonical type of the start element (optional).

references/eClassifiers/Label/references.title: width
references/eClassifiers/Label/references.content: Type EInt Multiplicity 0..1 * Width of the label box on the canvas.

references/eClassifiers/NamedElement/ind.title: NamedElement
references/eClassifiers/NamedElement/ind.content: * Abstract base for process elements that are identified by name within a process. Corresponds to the NamedType complex type in the BW process schema. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/ProcessDefinitio.title: starter
references/eClassifiers/ProcessDefinitio.content: Type Starter Multiplicity 0..1 * The optional event-source activity that starts this process (e.g. an HTTP receiver, JMS queue listener, Timer, …). When present, startName refers to this starter’s name.

references/eClassifiers/Transition/refer.title: condition
references/eClassifiers/Transition/refer.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 * XPath/XSL condition expression evaluated at runtime to decide whether this transition fires. Only used when conditionType is “expression”.

references/eClassifiers/Group/index.html.title: Group
references/eClassifiers/Group/index.html.content: * A group of activities, used to model structured constructs such as: - Loops (Repeat-Until, For-Each, While) - Error handlers / Fault handlers - Critical sections - Scope groups Corresponds to pd:group in the process XML. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/ProcessDefinitio.title: targetNamespace
references/eClassifiers/ProcessDefinitio.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 * The XML target namespace declared in the process file. Used to qualify XPath expressions within the process.

references/eClassifiers/ProcessDefinitio.title: labels
references/eClassifiers/ProcessDefinitio.content: Type Label Multiplicity 0..* * Visual annotation labels on the diagram.

references/eClassifiers/Starter/index.ht.title: Starter
references/eClassifiers/Starter/index.ht.content: * An event-source (starter) activity that triggers the process. Corresponds to pd:starter in the process XML. Examples: HTTP Event Source, JMS Queue Receiver, Timer, File Poller. Structurally identical to a regular Activity; modelled as a distinct class so that tooling can easily distinguish starters from regular steps. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/NamedElement/ref.title: name
references/eClassifiers/NamedElement/ref.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 * The element’s unique name within its containing scope (process or group). Used as the reference target in Transition.from and Transition.to.

references/eClassifiers/Label/index.html.title: Label
references/eClassifiers/Label/index.html.content: * A visual annotation (sticky-note style label) placed on the design canvas. Corresponds to pd:label in the process XML. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/ProcessDefinitio.title: ProcessDefinition
references/eClassifiers/ProcessDefinitio.content: * Root element of a Tibco BW 5.x process file (.process). Corresponds to pd:ProcessDefinition in the XML namespace http://xmlns.tibco.com/bw/process/2003. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/Transition/refer.title: from
references/eClassifiers/Transition/refer.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 * Name of the source activity, group, or pseudo-state (e.g. “Log”, “Start”, “IterateAndFindMatch”).

references/eClassifiers/Container/refere.title: groups
references/eClassifiers/Container/refere.content: Type Group Multiplicity 0..* * Groups of activities at the top level of this process (loops, scope, etc.).

references/eClassifiers/Container/refere.title: activities
references/eClassifiers/Container/refere.content: Type Activity Multiplicity 0..* * Activities (tasks/steps) at the top level of this process.

references/eClassifiers/Call/index.html.title: Call
references/eClassifiers/Call/index.html.content: * Calls are used for resolving inter-process communications. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/Transition/refer.title: conditionType
references/eClassifiers/Transition/refer.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 * How the transition is enabled. Common values: “always”, “expression”, “error”, “timeout”.

references/eClassifiers/Resource/index.h.title: Resource
references/eClassifiers/Resource/index.h.content: * Project resource - process definition, XSD, … Diagram

references/eClassifiers/Transition/index.title: Transition
references/eClassifiers/Transition/index.content: * A directed connection from one activity (or pseudo-state) to another. Corresponds to pd:transition in the process XML. The source and target are identified by the name of the containing NamedElement (Activity, Starter, Group, or the special names “Start” and “End” / “start” and “end” inside a group). Diagram

references/eClassifiers/ProcessDefinitio.title: returnBindings
references/eClassifiers/ProcessDefinitio.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 * XSL bindings that produce the process return value (output schema). Stored as raw XML text because the bindings reference arbitrary namespaces.

references/eClassifiers/Label/references.title: color
references/eClassifiers/Label/references.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 * Background color encoded as an RGB integer string.

references/eClassifiers/Node/references/.title: y
references/eClassifiers/Node/references/.content: Type EInt Multiplicity 0..1 * Y coordinate on the design canvas.

references/eClassifiers/Activity/index.h.title: Activity
references/eClassifiers/Activity/index.h.content: * An activity (task or step) within a BW process or group. Corresponds to pd:activity in the process XML. Diagram

references/eClassifiers/Label/references.title: fontColor
references/eClassifiers/Label/references.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 * Font color encoded as an RGB integer string.

references/eClassifiers/Resource/referen.title: projectPath
references/eClassifiers/Resource/referen.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 * Relative path in the project

references/eClassifiers/Transition/refer.title: lineColor
references/eClassifiers/Transition/refer.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 * RGB color of the transition line encoded as a signed integer (Java AWT convention), e.g. “-16777216” for black.

references/eClassifiers/Transition/refer.title: to
references/eClassifiers/Transition/refer.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 * Name of the target activity, group, or pseudo-state (e.g. “End”, “MapResultToResponse”).

references/eClassifiers/ProcessDefinitio.title: errorSchemas
references/eClassifiers/ProcessDefinitio.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 * Error schemas that this process can throw. Stored as raw XML text because they are arbitrary XSD fragments.

references/eClassifiers/Activity/referen.title: config
references/eClassifiers/Activity/referen.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 * Activity-specific configuration, stored as raw XML text. The structure varies per activity type.

references/eClassifiers/Project/index.ht.title: Project
references/eClassifiers/Project/index.ht.content: * Project is folder with vcrepo.dat file and with resourceType=“ae.rootfolder” in the .folder file Diagram

references/eClassifiers/Label/references.title: thickness
references/eClassifiers/Label/references.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 * Border line thickness.

references/eClassifiers/Group/references.title: expanded
references/eClassifiers/Group/references.content: Type EBoolean Multiplicity 0..1 * Whether the group is shown in expanded form on the canvas.

references/eClassifiers/Transition/refer.title: lineType
references/eClassifiers/Transition/refer.content: Type EString Multiplicity 0..1 * Visual style of the transition line. Common values: “Default”, “Straight”, “Curved”.

references/eClassifiers/Label/references.title: height
references/eClassifiers/Label/references.content: Type EInt Multiplicity 0..1 * Height of the label box on the canvas.

references/eClassifiers/Group/references.title: collapsedHeight
references/eClassifiers/Group/references.content: Type EInt Multiplicity 0..1 * Height of the group icon when collapsed.

references/eClassifiers/Container/refere.title: transitions
references/eClassifiers/Container/refere.content: Type Transition Multiplicity 0..* * Transitions at the top level of this process.

references/eClassifiers/CallTarget/index.title: CallTarget
references/eClassifiers/CallTarget/index.content: * Something that can receive calls Diagram

references/eClassifiers/ProcessDefinitio.title: processVariables
references/eClassifiers/ProcessDefinitio.content: Type ProcessVariable Multiplicity 0..* * Process-scoped variables declared in the process.

references/eClassifiers/Node/references/.title: x
references/eClassifiers/Node/references/.content: Type EInt Multiplicity 0..1 * X coordinate on the design canvas.

references/eClassifiers/Group/references.title: height
references/eClassifiers/Group/references.content: Type EInt Multiplicity 0..1 * Height of the expanded group frame on the design canvas.
